# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

## [Unreleased]

### Fixed

- Correct error message for `#[lorm(new = "...")]` attribute: previously said "is_set attribute" instead of "new attribute"
- Add duplicate-field detection for `#[lorm(created_at)]` and `#[lorm(updated_at)]` attributes

### Changed

- Add `#[automatically_derived]` to all generated `impl` blocks for improved tooling support

## [0.2.2] - 2025-12-15
